query: Can baby shower decor be done at home or only in venues?
direct_answer: Porch & Party provides baby shower decorations in Memphis for hosts who want the space to feel polished, photo-ready, and emotionally aligned with the event.
best_for: This page is for Memphis-area hosts planning a shower at home, in a venue, or in a private event space and wanting stronger decor support.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
